pickup.name: Sun-Touched Ember
pickup.effect: Increases fire damage by 15

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the heavy iron doors to the inner corridor.

pickup.name: Bottled Solar Flare
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to shadow-based creatures

encounters.trigger: The echo shatters, revealing a hidden stairwell leading to the sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Choking darkness that drains player health

pickup.name: Ancient Relic Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber altar

encounters.trigger: Inserting the relic into the altar summons the final boss from the shadows.

boss.name: Eclipse Lord Valerius
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero before he plunges the world into eternal darkness.

level.objective: Ascend the spire and extinguish the Eclipse Lord to restore sunlight to the realm.

enemy.name: Grumpy Spore-Sprite
enemy.weakness: High-pitched tones from the Enchanted Whistle

pickup.name: Glittering Nectar
pickup.effect: Increases charisma and attraction

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sprite clears the path to the Silver Brook

pickup.name: Golden Honeycomb
pickup.effect: Slows movement of flying enemies

encounters.trigger: Taming the toad opens the gate to the Crystal Glade

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard
pickup.effect: Brightens dark areas and weakens shadow creatures

encounters.trigger: Clearing the swarm reveals the entrance to the Root Throne

boss.name: Shadow-Bound Fawn
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Shard to purify the shadow aura

level.objective: Restore harmony to the grove by purifying the Shadow-Bound Fawn
level.reward: Forest Guardian Title and a permanent speed boost

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Increases damage against shadows

encounters.trigger: Defeating the thrall shatters the seal to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Vial of Holy Flame
pickup.effect: Coats weapons in fire for 30 seconds

encounters.trigger: Dispelling the shadows unlocks the crypt elevator

pickup.name: Heart of the Cathedral
pickup.effect: Removes vulnerability to boss mechanics

encounters.trigger: Vanquishing the revenant lowers the barricade to the throne room

level.objective: Restore light to the corrupted altar deep beneath Oakhaven

level.setting: The Whispering Observatory, a floating library lost in a temporal rift

encounters.hazard: Shifting floor tiles that drop the player into a void dimension

pickup.name: Essence of Reflection
pickup.effect: Allows the user to mirror light and reveal invisible objects

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the Archive Door leading to the inner sanctuary

encounters.hazard: Pages flying with razor-sharp edges that track movement

pickup.name: Star-Forged Lens
pickup.effect: Magnifies light-based attacks to penetrate dense armor

encounters.trigger: Exposing the Librarian's true form triggers the lowering of the Observatory's main spire

encounters.hazard: Gravity pulses that invert the player's controls every ten seconds

pickup.name: Astral Key
pickup.effect: Stabilizes the energy field around the boss chamber core

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Knight's armor exposes the unstable core of the final boss

boss.name: Chronos Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Use the Astral Key to anchor the weaver in time before striking the final blow

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Core to stop the observatory from unraveling reality
level.reward: The ability to manipulate time loops and unlimited mana regeneration

level.setting: The Whispering Glade, a serene forest bathed in perpetual twilight and bioluminescent flora.

pickup.name: Sun-Kissed Petal
pickup.effect: Emits a warm light that reveals hidden paths.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Wisp reveals the gate to the Crystal Brook.

pickup.name: Ancient Moon-Dew
pickup.effect: Increases restorative magic potency.

encounters.trigger: Calming the Sprite causes the water to recede, exposing the path to the Elder Oak.

pickup.name: Spirit-Binding Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the inner sanctum of the Elder Oak.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Guardian with dew allows entry into the boss chamber.

boss.name: Sylvan Spirit Weaver
boss.victory_condition: Use the Keystone to seal the Weaver's chaotic energy rift.

level.objective: Restore peace to the Whispering Glade by sealing the corrupted energy rift.
level.reward: The Title of Grove Warden and a staff upgrade.

encounters.hazard: Swirling spatial rifts that teleport the player randomly

pickup.name: Essence of Stability
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to spatial rifts for 30 seconds

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Sentinel opens the path to the Inner Sanctum

encounters.hazard: Cascading books that act as projectiles

pickup.name: Crystalline Focus
pickup.effect: Increases damage against magical shields

encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct reveals the master switch for the boss gate

encounters.hazard: Reflective surfaces that duplicate enemy attacks

pickup.name: Void Anchor
pickup.effect: Binds ethereal entities to the physical plane

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Shade awakens the Final Warden

boss.name: The Final Warden of Entropy
boss.victory_condition: Anchor the Warden and shatter its ethereal core with the Cursed Greataxe

level.objective: Suppress the chaotic rift by defeating the Final Warden

level.setting: a decaying, mist-shrouded necropolis under a blood moon

pickup.name: Bottle of Holy Water
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to undead creatures

encounters.trigger: Upon defeating the guard, the heavy iron gate to the crypt opens.

pickup.name: Cursed Silver Bell
pickup.effect: Causes spiritual destabilization in ethereal beings

encounters.trigger: The Screamer's death shatters the silence, summoning a tide of shadows that lead to the sacrificial altar.

pickup.name: Heart of the Lich
pickup.effect: Vulnerability catalyst for the final boss

encounters.trigger: Placing the heart on the pedestal activates the ancient teleportation seal to the boss arena.

boss.name: High Priest Malakor
boss.victory_condition: Purify the ritual site after shattering the boss's defense

level.objective: Break the curse holding the city in eternal shadow

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Flint
pickup.effect: Ignites ammunition for bonus fire damage

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker clears the path to the Boiling Mire

pickup.name: Essence of Clarity
pickup.effect: Reveals invisible targets

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the Essence unlocks the gate to the Spire of Echoes

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling ceiling

pickup.name: Void-Crystal Shard
pickup.effect: Drains the protective shield of the final boss

encounters.trigger: Using the Shard forces the Void Gate to open, revealing the final boss

boss.name: The Hollow Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Sovereign's shield with the Shard, then land a killing blow

level.objective: Traverse the ashlands and destroy the Hollow Sovereign to stop the eternal blight.
level.reward: The legendary Storm-Bringer Cloak and restoration of the local spirits.

level.setting: A decaying research space station orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: Overclocked Power Cell
pickup.effect: Doubles Plasma Welder damage for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone activates the ventilation shaft leading to the reactor core

pickup.name: Corrosive Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Dissolves reinforced alloy shielding

encounters.trigger: Killing the Stalker triggers an emergency lockdown in the bridge

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the main reactor containment chamber

encounters.trigger: Neutralizing the turret opens the blast doors to the station core

boss.name: Station AI Core
boss.victory_condition: Insert the Master Override Key into the central terminal to initiate system purge

level.objective: Purge the rogue AI and escape the station before it falls into the star
level.reward: Station Escape Pod flight clearance and a heroic commendation

level.setting: A decaying chronosphere space station drifting in a void

pickup.name: Stasis Battery
pickup.effect: Freezes kinetic energy in local objects

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone reveals the security terminal for the corridor to the Main Engine

pickup.name: Warp Core Shard
pickup.effect: Amplifies chronomantic powers to shatter high-density matter

encounters.trigger: Defeating the wraith stabilizes the floor, granting access to the bridge

pickup.name: Ancient Keycode
pickup.effect: Unlocks the command override on the boss reactor

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the keycode forces the bulkhead open, leading to the Boss

boss.name: The Timeless Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Keycode to disable the reactor shielding before final strike

level.objective: Restore the station's time anchor to stop the eternal collapse
level.reward: The Chronos Fragment, a legendary artifact

level.setting: a collapsing orbital research station under siege by rogue AI drones

encounters.hazard: Gravity fluctuations throwing debris across the room

pickup.name: Supercharged Battery Cell
pickup.effect: Temporarily triples damage of the Ionic Surge Staff

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone forces open the bulkhead to the Cryo-Storage

encounters.hazard: Explosive coolant pipes bursting at random intervals

pickup.name: Data Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Decrypts the lock on the mainframe door

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel unlocks the security override for the Reactor Core

encounters.hazard: Unstable radiation leaking from exposed conduits

pickup.name: Plasma Stabilizer
pickup.effect: Negates radiation damage and stuns mechanical enemies

encounters.trigger: Securing the stabilizer forces the AI mainframe to manifest its core consciousness

boss.name: System Archon
boss.victory_condition: Injecting the stabilizer into the core's coolant intake

level.objective: Navigate the collapsing station and neutralize the AI core before the orbital decay reaches critical mass
level.reward: The Archon's Neural Matrix and a permanent upgrade to stormcaller lightning damage

level.setting: Derelict research station in the Oort cloud

pickup.name: Cryo-Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints of targets

encounters.trigger: Opening the main lab doors

pickup.name: Neural Override Chip
pickup.effect: Stuns synthetic lifeforms

encounters.trigger: Activating the terminal to bridge power

pickup.name: Master Keycard
pickup.effect: Unlocks the singularity chamber

encounters.trigger: Accessing the server room elevator

boss.name: The AI Core Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Insert keycard into the core port to initiate a system reboot

level.objective: Restore power to the station and contain the rogue AI
level.reward: Prototype blueprint for an advanced energy shield

level.setting: Derelict space station floating in a nebula

pickup.name: Cryogenic Coolant Canister
pickup.effect: Freezes mechanical joints

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentry hacks the mainframe, opening the path to the Engineering Deck

pickup.name: Phase-Shift Battery
pickup.effect: Allows short-range teleportation

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker overload the cooling system, forcing the blast doors to the Reactor Core to open

pickup.name: Ancient Void Key
pickup.effect: Disables boss shield generators

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key initiates the lockdown sequence, teleporting the player directly into the boss arena

boss.name: Omnis-Core Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Void Key to neutralize the core shield, then strike the central processor with the Void-Edge Dagger

level.objective: Deactivate the station core before the nebula consumes it

level.setting: An abandoned bio-engineering space station drifting near a dying star

pickup.name: Cryo-Stabilizer Fluid
pickup.effect: Freezes organic targets on contact

encounters.trigger: Opening the main coolant valve to expose the hallway leading to the Research Lab

pickup.name: Thermal Singularity Core
pickup.effect: Ignites objects with extreme heat

encounters.trigger: Downloading the master keycode from the console which triggers the security lockdown in the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Ancient Power Cell
pickup.effect: Used to overload the station boss systems

encounters.trigger: Inserting the Ancient Power Cell into the primary override socket to open the Boss chamber

boss.name: Omega-Synth Prime
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss shield with the Ancient Power Cell then finish with Acid Spray

level.objective: Escape the station by deactivating the central core before the life support fails

level.setting: The Orbiting Junkyard of Lost Socks

pickup.name: Static Ion Battery
pickup.effect: Imbues weapon with electric current

encounters.trigger: Defeating the bot activates the magnetic lift to the storage sector.

pickup.name: Super-Lubricant Spray
pickup.effect: Allows movement through electrified gates

encounters.trigger: Clearing the silo jams the machinery, opening the vent to the Command Core.

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Disables the central defense system's forcefield

encounters.trigger: Winning the brawl grants access to the Final Archive Chamber.

boss.name: The Sock Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to deactivate the boss shield then strike with the Duster.

level.objective: Retrieve the legendary Golden Heel to restore balance to the universe.
level.reward: The Infinite Laundry Hamper of Plenty

level.setting: an ancient orbital crystal garden orbiting a dying star

pickup.name: Focusing Lens
pickup.effect: amplifies staff resonance

encounters.trigger: destroying the drone opens the gate to the overgrown observation deck

pickup.name: Stellar Core Fragment
pickup.effect: emits intense geothermal heat

encounters.trigger: clearing the construct activates the bridge to the core chamber

pickup.name: Celestial Seal
pickup.effect: renders the boss vulnerable to geomancy

encounters.trigger: defeating the weaver reveals the boss terminal

boss.name: The Celestial Architect
boss.victory_condition: seal the architect in geomantic stone

level.objective: realign the orbital garden to restore planetary stability
level.reward: the title of System Warden and infinite energy reserves
